title: PM Dependency Write Surface (Minimal)
objective: Implement the next bounded PM entity write lane by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for `work.dependencies` only, reusing the proven task and assignment write validation posture for intra-work references while adding merged predecessor/successor task validation and a no-self-cycle API guard that mirrors the existing DDL constraint without changing database schema or broadening PM mutation scope.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for `work.dependencies` only, increasing the work schema registry from 16 to 18 entries
Minimal mutation-service and router wiring for `POST /api/v1/work/dependencies` and `PATCH /api/v1/work/dependencies/{dependency_id}` only

Merged foreign-key validation for `predecessor_task_id` and `successor_task_id` using the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape, plus a `@model_validator(mode="after")` no-self-cycle guard that mirrors the DDL constraint and bounded 404 behavior for missing dependencies

Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-013, packet-013i, packet-013j, packet-014, packet-014i, packet-015, and packet-015i surfaces remain intact after the minimal dependency-write addition
validation_steps: Confirm packet 016 touches only the bounded dependency POST/PATCH runtime path and does not add execution-issue, progress-snapshot, or WBS-node writes
Confirm create and update contracts for dependencies reuse the existing model and enum surface where possible and raise the work schema registry from 16 to 18 entries only

Confirm the live write surface merges bad `predecessor_task_id` and `successor_task_id` validation into the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape, mirrors the DDL no-self-cycle rule through a `@model_validator(mode="after")`, and preserves 404 behavior for a missing dependency

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-013 work-package write tests, packet-013i work-package integration smoke, packet-013j response enrichment tests, packet-014 task-write tests, packet-014i task integration smoke, packet-015 assignment-write tests, and packet-015i assignment integration smoke still pass or skip as expected after the dependency-write addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 016 is runtime implementation only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader write-surface expansion are authorized.
